title: rosa hybrida f. genuina
intro: Rosa hybrida f. genuina, also known as the true hybrid tea rose, is a type of rose plant that belongs to the Rosa hybrida species, characterized by its high center and large, repeat-flowering blooms. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Rosa hybrida f. genuina include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Rosa hybrida f. genuina can be used in various herbal preparations, such as rose tea, rose oil, and rose petal extract, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
